requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Mains Voltage, Frequency, and Plug Type
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——电网电压、频率及插头类型
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——電網電壓、頻率及插頭類型

summary.en: Angola operates on 220–230 V / 50 Hz mains electricity. Type C (two-pin, ungrounded, European Schuko-compatible) plug is the most common standard; Type G (British three-pin) may be found in some older installations. Wireless and IoT devices with external power supplies (adapters, chargers) must support 220–230 V / 50 Hz input or be supplied with Type C-compatible adapters. Product labelling and user documentation must be in Portuguese.
summary.zh: 安哥拉电网电压为220–230 V / 50 Hz。C型插头（双针、无接地，兼容欧式Schuko）是最常见的标准；部分老旧建筑可能使用G型（英式三针）插头。配有外部电源（适配器、充电器）的无线和物联网设备须支持220–230 V / 50 Hz输入，或配备兼容C型插头的适配器。产品标签和用户文件须以葡萄牙语提供。
summary.zht: 安哥拉電網電壓為220–230 V / 50 Hz。C型插頭（雙針、無接地，相容歐式Schuko）是最常見的標準；部分老舊建築可能使用G型（英式三針）插頭。配有外部電源（適配器、充電器）的無線和物聯網裝置須支援220–230 V / 50 Hz輸入，或配備相容C型插頭的適配器。產品標籤和使用者文件須以葡萄牙語提供。

standards_or_laws: Plug Type C (CEE 7/16, two-pin ungrounded) — primary
Portuguese-language product labelling and user documentation

summary.en: China operates on 220 V / 50 Hz mains electricity. Type I (Australian-style, three-pin) and Type A (US-style, two flat pins) plugs are used domestically. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety under GB 8898 and related standards for audio/video and IT equipment. Chinese power adapters are typically rated 100–240 V to support international use but carry Chinese domestic plug types.
summary.zh: 中国电网电压为220 V / 50 Hz。国内使用I型（澳式三针）和A型（美式两扁针）插头。CCC（中国强制认证）依据GB 8898及相关标准涵盖音视频和IT设备的电气安全。中国电源适配器通常额定100–240 V以支持国际使用，但配备中国国内插头类型。
summary.zht: 中國電網電壓為220 V / 50 Hz。國內使用I型（澳式三針）和A型（美式兩扁針）插頭。CCC（中國強制認證）依據GB 8898及相關標準涵蓋音視頻和IT設備的電氣安全。中國電源適配器通常額定100–240 V以支援國際使用，但配備中國國內插頭類型。

standards_or_laws: Plug Type I (GB 2099 / AS/NZS 3112 compatible) and Type A
GB 8898 — Safety requirements for audio/video and IT equipment
GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment

gap.en: Chinese devices ship with Type I or Type A plugs; Angola uses Type C (and some Type G). Devices or bundled power adapters must be supplied with Type C plugs or universal adapters rated for 220–230 V / 50 Hz. Chinese GB/CCC electrical safety certificates are not recognised by IANORQ or INACOM. Product labelling must be in Portuguese, not Mandarin or English only.
gap.zh: 中国设备配备I型或A型插头；安哥拉使用C型（部分使用G型）插头。设备或随附电源适配器须配备C型插头或额定220–230 V / 50 Hz的万能适配器。中国GB/CCC电气安全证书不被IANORQ或INACOM认可。产品标签须使用葡萄牙语，不得仅使用普通话或英语。
gap.zht: 中國設備配備I型或A型插頭；安哥拉使用C型（部分使用G型）插頭。裝置或隨附電源適配器須配備C型插頭或額定220–230 V / 50 Hz的萬能適配器。中國GB/CCC電氣安全證書不被IANORQ或INACOM認可。產品標籤須使用葡萄牙語，不得僅使用普通話或英語。

source.publisher: IANORQ — Instituto Angolano de Normalização e Qualidade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese Type I / Type A plug configurations are incompatible with Angola Type C sockets. Power supplies and adapters must be rated for 220–230 V / 50 Hz and fitted with Type C plugs. Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Angola; IANORQ conformity assessment and Portuguese labelling are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国I型/A型插头配置与安哥拉C型插座不兼容。电源和适配器须额定220–230 V / 50 Hz并配备C型插头。中国CCC电气安全认证在安哥拉不被认可；需进行IANORQ符合性评估并提供葡萄牙语标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國I型/A型插頭配置與安哥拉C型插座不相容。電源和適配器須額定220–230 V / 50 Hz並配備C型插頭。中國CCC電氣安全認證在安哥拉不被認可；需進行IANORQ符合性評估並提供葡萄牙語標籤。
